description: Test class for SupportingDocumentService, focusing on uploading, metadata handling, ownership enforcement, and deletion of supporting documents. Contains unit tests with mocks for dependencies like repository and storage service.

classes.name: test_supporting_document_service_test
classes.description: JUnit 5 test class for SupportingDocumentService with multiple test cases for upload validation, metadata processing, ownership, and deletion.

methods.name: upload_emptyFile_rejected
methods.description: Tests that uploading an empty file throws an IllegalArgumentException with message 'file is required'.

methods.name: upload_tooLarge_rejected
methods.description: Tests that uploading a file exceeding max bytes throws an IllegalArgumentException indicating size limit.

methods.name: upload_unsupportedContentType_rejected
methods.description: Tests that uploading a file with unsupported content type raises an exception listing allowed types.

methods.name: upload_happyPath_persistsMetadataAndChecksum
methods.description: Tests successful upload, verifying metadata normalization, filename sanitization, SHA-256 checksum, and persistence.

methods.name: upload_metadataMustBeObject
methods.description: Ensures that metadata JSON must be an object, rejecting arrays or other JSON types.

methods.name: download_notOwnedOrMissing_rejected
methods.description: Tests that attempting to download a document not owned by user results in an exception.

methods.name: delete_owned_callsStorageDelete
methods.description: Verifies that deleting an owned document calls storage delete method and removes record from repository.
